action.reasoning: Observation: mae_60min improved from 5.0671 (tiny model) to 4.2094 (hidden=64, spatial=32, blocks=3) with 15 epochs. Loss still declining. Analysis: Larger model and longer training should further reduce error. Remaining time ~2.9h, plenty for 40-epoch run (~5 min). Decision: Scale up model (hidden=128, spatial=64, blocks=4, dropout=0.15, weight_decay=1e-4), add AMP for speed, train for 40 epochs, then submit eval.
